Work closely with other members of the team to make sure that implementation is done according to the design
  
Be autonomous and proactive in your work
  
Coaching junior designers and providing constructive feedback on their work
  
Delegation of less complex tasks to junior designers
  
Uphold good relationships within the team with a clear understanding of expectations for the game we are making
  
  

Required Qualifications
  
At least three years of professional games industry experience in Game Design
  
A demonstrable experience with complex system and feature designs
  
Ability to work highly independently with assigned tasks and take responsibility for delivering game design specifications according to the project’s schedule
  
A solid understanding of core loops and player experience
  
A genuine passion for strategy games and Paradox games in particular
  
Fluent in spoken and written English
  
Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work and inspire in a team environment
  
  

As a bonus, you might have
  
An academic or personal interest in history, economics, and/or politics
  
Experience with programming or scripting
  
Experience with creating mods for Paradox games
  
Experience with other strategy games
  
Tertiary skills in related fields such as UX, Art, or Sound
  
  

Practical Information
  
Please make sure you include a cover letter where you outline why you want to join Paradox, what level of experience with Paradox games you have, and what other games you play.
  
We would like your application to include any relevant work samples and/or a link to your portfolio if you have one. We are especially interested in examples of gameplay systems and related work that you have previously designed or implemented.
  
Join Paradox and help us shape Victoria 3! Design rich systems, create meaningful historical events, and build stories players will remember.

title: Two Senior Software Engineers - Gothenburg and Hudiksvall
description:
Join the team building smart, scalable solutions that simplify everyday life for small and medium-sized businesses
  
About the role
  
As a Senior Software Engineer, you will design, develop, test, and maintain our software solutions. You will work closely with product owners, UX/UI designers, team managers, and fellow developers to build scalable, secure, and user-friendly applications that meet the needs of small and medium-sized businesses.
  
You bring your technical expertise throughout the development process — from understanding requirements and proposing solutions to implementation, code reviews, troubleshooting, and incident handling. Writing clean, maintainable, and well-documented code is a natural part of your work, as is contributing to improvements in ways of working, coding standards, and technical processes.
  
You will play an active role in shaping solutions that create real value for users, balancing technical quality with business needs.
  
This is a role for someone who wants to work in a product-oriented environment where quality, security, user value, and long-term development are central to everyday work.
  
About you
  
We believe you are an experienced developer who enjoys working collaboratively and contributing to a strong team culture. You take a structured approach to your work, deliver high-quality results, and feel comfortable sharing ideas and influencing decisions when needed.
  
  

**To be successful in this role, we believe you have:**  

At least 5 years of professional experience with .NET (C#) and/or Java, including version control using Git
  
A relevant higher education degree in software development, or equivalent professional experience
  
Experience working in agile teams and using tools such as Jira
  
Fluent English skills; Swedish is a plus
  
Experience using AI tools in your daily work
  
  

It’s a bonus if you also have experience with technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and SQL, or if you have worked with products related to finance or accounting.
  
As a person, you are solution-oriented, engaged, and motivated by creating value for users. You thrive in a team where collaboration and knowledge sharing are a natural part of everyday work, and you contribute to a positive and supportive working environment.
  
You have a holistic mindset, an interest in business logic, and a willingness to contribute to our products over time. You combine a structured way of working with the ability to take initiative and find creative solutions when needed.
  
You also have a natural interest in taking on a lead role over time, supporting others and helping the team move forward.
  
Who We Are
  
We are Bjorn Lunden, the business platform that simplifies everyday life for small and medium-sized businesses. Our belief is simple: every business deserves opportunities to grow, and we’re here to make that happen .
  
We’re on an exciting journey. With bold ambitions, our vision is to become one of the leading providers of accounting and financial software solutions in Northwestern Europe. With our roots in Hälsingland, specifically in the small village of Näsviken, we’ve grown rapidly in recent years, transforming from a smaller national company into an international group. Today, we operate in Sweden, the Netherlands, and Denmark.
  
**Our goal is straightforward:** to make life a little easier for entrepreneurs and business owners. We believe we can do that through great software, knowledge, innovation, and TACO. Not the kind you might be thinking of - but our version: Trust, Ambition, Collaboration, and Ownership.
  
What We Offer
  
We offer you a role in an international, growing company with a strong market position and the ambition to challenge industry giants. The wellbeing of our employees truly matters to us, and we want to be a fair and responsible employer where people feel good and enjoy their work.
  
We strive for a healthy work-life balance and support this through competitive conditions and benefits and flexible work opportunities. We want to be the natural first choice for people who want to thrive and have fun at work.
  
Application
  
We are looking for two Senior Software Engineers, one in Gothenburg and one in either Hudiksvall, Näsviken or Ljusdal.
  
The application deadline is 9 August 2026, but selection and interviews may take place on an ongoing basis. The position may therefore be filled before the deadline, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.
  
  

**If you have any questions about the role, please contact:**  

Lars Nyman, Head of Software Engineering Lars.Nyman@bjornlunden.com
  
* For this recruitment, we kindly ask that recruitment agencies or other external partners refrain from contacting us.

title: Fullstack Product Engineer
description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**

  

We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.  



  

**About the Team**

  

About Sana
  

Sana is an AI lab building superintelligence for work. We believe organizations can accomplish their missions faster when teams can effortlessly access knowledge, automate repetitive work, and learn anything with the help of agentic AI. As part of Workday, we are committed to building AI that augments people - not replaces them.
  

  

We bring this mission to life through two products. Sana Agents provide a seamless way to access all your company’s apps, knowledge, and data, enabling AI agents to do real work so teams can process and act on information at unprecedented scale. Sana Learn is an AI-powered learning hub that combines the simplicity of a modern learning platform with intelligent features like an AI tutor, automated content generation, and interactive apps, making knowledge not just accessible but actionable.
  

  

We’re a talent-dense, product-obsessed team of engineers and designers from companies like Google, Spotify, Apple, and Databricks, united by deep technical excellence and rapid iteration. Our tools already help over a million people learn and work better across hundreds of leading enterprises - and we’re just getting started.  

  

**About the Role**

  

**About the role**
==================

Ship customer-facing value quickly in small teams - owning everything from problem definition through UX, API, and instrumentation. You’ll work end-to-end to deliver features that delight users and move the needle for Sana and our customers.


**In this role, you will**
==========================

* Own features from design to deploy - frontend (React/TypeScript), backend (Node/TypeScript) and database (Postgres)
* Integrate with agent and retrieval APIs to deliver seamless product experiences
* Instrument products, run A/B tests, and iterate quickly with design and PM
* Make pragmatic trade-offs and thrive in ambiguous 0 1 product spaces
* Collaborate closely with stakeholders, users and teammates to define and solve the right problems

  

**About You**

  

**What success looks like**
===========================

* Features ship fast, delight users, and drive measurable impact
* End-to-end ownership is the norm - problems are solved, not handed off
* Product instrumentation and A/B tests inform every iteration
* You are a force multiplier for your squad, making everyone around you better
* Ambiguity is an opportunity, not a blocker

**Our tech stack**
==================

We build on a simple modern stack optimized for both humans and AI.


* **Backend:** TypeScript, Kotlin, Node.js
* **Frontend:** TypeScript, React, Tailwind
* **Databases:** Postgres, Redis
* **Cloud infra:** GCP/Kubernetes/Terraform

  

**Workday Pay Transparency Statement (For EU Locations Only)**

  

Listed below is the base salary range applicable to this position. Workday pay ranges (and the precise pay offered to the successful candidate) are based on a number of objective criteria such as relevant experience and skills, and educational qualifications, level of responsibility, demands of the role, work location and business need. As a part of the total compensation package, this role may be eligible for the Workday Bonus Plan or a role-specific commission/bonus, as well as annual refresh stock grants awarded by Workday Inc. For more information regarding Workday’s comprehensive benefits, please click here .  



Primary Location Base Pay Range: kr739,000 SEK - kr1,109,000 SEK Sweden  

**Our Approach to Flexible Work**  



With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in-office each week, we simply **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.  



  

Pursuant to applicable Fair Chance law, Workday will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.  



  

Workday is an Equal Opportunity Employer including individuals with disabilities and protected veterans.  



  

At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com .  



  

**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**

  

At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.  



Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.  



In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

title: Senior Business Analyst (Commerce)
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Business Analysis
* ID 510495-en\_US
Choosing Capgemini means joining a global community where you can shape your career, collaborate with inspiring colleagues, and reimagine what’s possible. In our Digital Customer Experience (DCX) team, we design smart, inclusive solutions that transform how people interact with digital services through data, design, and technology. Together with leading technology partners, we deliver meaningful experiences that make a real difference for people and businesses, while shaping a more sustainable future. Join us and help create exceptional customer experiences!


**About the role**

  

  

A Business Analyst for SAP Commerce is responsible for translating business requirements into scalable eCommerce solutions using SAP Commerce Cloud. The role bridges business stakeholders and technical teams to ensure successful design, implementation, and rollout of digital commerce platforms.  



  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*  



* Lead requirements workshops and translate business needs into functional specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
* Design end-to-end customer journeys and functional solutions across the integrated SAP Commerce Cloud landscape.
* Provide SAP Commerce Cloud expertise, including configuration of core features (catalog, pricing, promotions, CMS, checkout) and collaboration on integrations (e.g., S/4HANA, CPI, payments, search).
* Support agile delivery by managing backlog, prioritization, and close collaboration with Dev, UX, QA, and architecture teams.
* Drive testing and quality (SIT/UAT), stakeholder engagement, documentation, and ensure governance, compliance, and solution alignment.
  

**Your Profile**

  

* 6–10 years of experience in eCommerce processes (B2B/B2C), including multi-country/multi-site rollouts.
* Experience with SAP Commerce Cloud (Hybris) modules, architecture, and core capabilities (pricing, promotions, catalog, CMS, checkout).
* Exposure to SAP ecosystem integrations (S/4HANA, CPI/SCPI, OMS) and understanding of APIs, data models, and middleware concepts.
* Experience working in Agile/SAFe environments with tools like JIRA, Confluence, or similar.
* Strong stakeholder communication and workshop facilitation skills, with ability to work effectively in distributed (onshore/offshore) teams.
  

  

**Nice to have**


* Experience in manufacturing, retail, or logistics.
* Exposure to SAP CX beyond Commerce (e.g., CPQ, CDC, Marketing Cloud).
* Experience in large-scale transformation programs.
  

**What we believe you will enjoy about working here**

  

* A dynamic and inclusive work environment with access to global expertise and innovation.
* Opportunities to work on high-impact projects across industries.
* Continuous learning through certifications, guilds, and mentorship.
* A culture driven by Capgemini’s core values: Honesty, Boldness, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, and Fun.
  

**Application**
  

We look forward to receiving your application and will review candidates on an ongoing basis. As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.


#LI-LZ1


**About Capgemini**  

Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.

title: Senior Product Designer (UX/UI)
description:
#### **Senior Product Designer – Consulting Assignment within Consumer Digital Products**


Are you passionate about creating innovative digital products and customer experiences that make a real impact? We at WeQuel are currently looking for a Senior Product Designer for a consulting assignment with one of our clients. This is an exciting opportunity to shape the future of digital products in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment where design plays a strategic role in business success.


As a consultant with us, you will have the opportunity to work with some of our clients who are leading companies within the pharmaceutical, manufacturing, and industrial sectors, contributing to process optimization, implementation of new technologies, and the development of sustainable solutions.

##### **About the Role**


As a Senior Product Designer, you will lead user-centered design initiatives from early discovery through delivery. Working closely with product managers, engineers, and business stakeholders, you will help define product strategy, facilitate workshops, validate ideas with users, and translate insights into intuitive and engaging digital experiences.


This role requires both strategic thinking and hands-on design expertise. You will navigate complex stakeholder environments, drive innovation initiatives, and contribute to the creation of new digital products, services, and customer experiences. You will also explore how emerging technologies, including AI, can create meaningful value for both customers and the business.

##### **Your main responsibilities will include:**

* Lead end-to-end product design activities from discovery to delivery
* Facilitate workshops, discovery sessions, and user-centered design processes
* Conduct user research, concept development, prototyping, and usability testing
* Design intuitive user experiences and high-quality user interfaces
* Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and cross-functional teams
* Translate customer insights into actionable product improvements and new concepts
* Drive innovation by identifying opportunities for AI-enabled products and services
* Develop scalable design solutions across digital customer journeys
* Present design concepts and facilitate discussions with senior stakeholders
* Contribute to product strategy and long-term experience vision

##### **We are looking for someone who:**

* Has extensive experience as a Product Designer, UX Designer, or Digital Experience Designer
* Has senior-level experience leading design work in complex stakeholder environments
* Has proven experience designing and launching AI-powered products, services, or customer experiences
* Can identify opportunities where AI creates meaningful customer and business value
* Has strong expertise in UX design, UI design, interaction design, and design thinking
* Is experienced in user research, concept development, prototyping, experimentation, and usability testing
* Has a track record of creating new products, services, or customer experiences—not only optimizing existing ones.
* Has strong strategic UX and systems thinking capabilities
* Can design end-to-end experiences across digital, physical, and service touchpoints
* Is experienced in facilitating workshops and discovery sessions
* Has strong stakeholder management, storytelling, and communication skills
* Has experience collaborating closely with Product, Engineering, Data Science, and other cross-functional teams
* Has excellent knowledge of Figma, Miro, Microsoft Teams, and modern digital collaboration tools
* Is fluent in English, both written and spoken. Swedish is meritorious

##### **We Offer:**


At WeQuel, you become part of a consulting team that values people first – we believe that success is built through engagement, collaboration, and development. We offer a flat organization with short decision-making paths, a strong sense of community, and the opportunity to influence your own professional growth.

title: System Engineer
description:
As a System Engineer within our team Load Assist, you will help shape one of Volvo Construction Equipment's most advanced productivity solutions. Load Assist combines embedded systems, cloud services, mobile applications and automation to deliver intuitive features that improve productivity, precision and the overall operator experience.


If you enjoy turning complex technology into intuitive user experiences and want to develop products that make a real difference in the field, this could be your next step.

**About us**
------------


At CPAC Systems, we develop intelligent control systems that help shape the future of marine and industrial applications. As part of Volvo Group, we combine cutting-edge technology with deep industry expertise to create solutions that improve safety, productivity and user experience for customers around the world.


Since 1999, we have been transforming complex operations into intuitive experiences. Today, we are 250 colleagues with a portfolio of more than 80 patents and deliver over 500,000 products every year. Our work spans everything from electrification and connectivity to intelligent automation, always with the ambition to build technology that makes a real difference.

**Your role**
-------------


As a System Engineer you will play a central role in developing a productivity application used in Volvo wheel loaders around the world. The solution helps operators perform accurate load weighing while seamlessly integrating with cloud services, mobile applications and other machine platforms.


You will work throughout the entire development lifecycle, from defining requirements and systemizing new functionality to supporting releases, troubleshooting complex customer issues and ensuring the right balance between functionality, cybersecurity and functional safety.


Working closely with software developers, UX designers, testers and system engineers across Volvo Group, you will help transform customer needs into robust, user-friendly solutions.


This is a hands-on role where you will combine technical system thinking with close collaboration across disciplines while influencing both today's products and tomorrow's automation solutions.


You will primarily work from our office in Mölndal, where close collaboration is a natural part of everyday work. We offer the flexibility to work remotely one day per week.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Define, structure and maintain system requirements throughout the development lifecycle.
* Work closely with test engineers to ensure complete and traceable test coverage.
* Drive the system design of new features together with cross-functional development teams.
* Document software releases and system changes.
* Collaborate with UX designers to create intuitive user interactions.
* Support troubleshooting of complex system and customer issues.
* Maintain and improve system structures and workflows in Jira.
* Participate in system-level planning and decision making together with Volvo through cross-functional engineering forums.
* Contribute to cybersecurity planning and system requirement definition.
* Support functional safety activities for future automation features.
* Collaborate with other system engineers to establish common engineering methods, structures and best practices.

**Your profile**
----------------


We believe you have experience working with complex embedded systems and enjoy connecting technical details with the bigger system perspective.

 **To succeed in this role, you have:**

* At least 5 years of relevant experience in systems engineering or embedded product development.
* A Bachelor's degree or higher in a relevant technical discipline.

 **Experience in several of the following areas is highly valued:**

* Systems engineering within embedded products, automotive or off-highway applications.
* Requirements engineering and system documentation.
* Working in cross-functional product development teams.
* Functional safety and/or cybersecurity.
* Experience with Jira or similar engineering lifecycle management tools.
* Embedded software development and system integration.
* Complex system analysis and structured problem solving.
* Fluent in English, both written and spoken.
* Knowledge of infotainment systems or Android development is a plus.

**Who you are**
---------------

  

You are a curious and collaborative systems engineer who enjoys solving complex technical challenges together with others. You communicate clearly, take ownership and build strong relationships across disciplines. With a structured mindset and a passion for continuous improvement, you help turn complex ideas into reliable solutions that create real value for customers.

**How to apply**
----------------


Due to the summer holiday period, we will begin reviewing applications and provide the first updates in the recruitment process from week 33. If you have any questions about the role, feel free to contact Victoria Sahlberg, Talent Partner, at **victoria.sahlberg@cpacsystems.se**.


As part of our recruitment process, we conduct background checks as well as drug and alcohol testing.

title: Senior Digital Product Designer
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**  

We are looking for an experienced Senior Digital Product Designer to join a multidisciplinary design team focused on creating seamless digital and physical user experiences within the automotive industry.


In this role, you will collaborate closely with Product Management, Engineering, UX Research, Brand, Interior, and Exterior Design teams to develop intuitive, visually engaging, and user-centered digital products. You will contribute throughout the entire product design lifecycle—from concept exploration and user research to interaction design, prototyping, and production-ready UI.


This opportunity is ideal for a designer with strong product thinking, exceptional UX/UI craftsmanship, and a passion for creating meaningful customer experiences.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Drive end-to-end product design from concept through implementation.
* Maintain a holistic view of the in-vehicle digital experience, ensuring consistency across products and touchpoints.
* Translate complex product requirements into intuitive and engaging user experiences.
* Develop user flows, wireframes, high-fidelity interfaces, interactive prototypes, and implementation-ready design specifications.
* Create polished interaction designs, micro-interactions, and UI animations.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align user needs, business objectives, and technical constraints.
* Facilitate design discussions and effectively communicate concepts to stakeholders.
* Contribute to and maintain scalable design systems.
* Conduct user research and usability testing, incorporating insights into design decisions.
* Ensure a high standard of design quality throughout the development process.

**Requirements:**

* Proven experience as a Senior Product Designer, UX/UI Designer, or Interaction Designer.
* Strong portfolio showcasing digital product design across complex platforms.
* Expertise in user-centered design, interaction design, information architecture, and visual design.
* Experience designing products throughout the complete design lifecycle.
* Strong skills in creating user journeys, interaction flows, wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI.
* Experience with design systems, component libraries, and developer handoff documentation.
* Ability to create refined UI animations and interaction details.
* Experience collaborating with multidisciplinary teams including designers, engineers, researchers, product managers, and strategists.
* Experience conducting user research and usability testing.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Fluent English, both written and spoken.
* Valid driver's license.

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: AI-Native Product Engineer
description:
**Ready to build AI products that solve real problems?** Join Synmatch AI's client as an **AI-Native Product Engineer** with a Berlin-based startup building an AI-native platform for managed agents that transform fragmented data into real-time strategy. They're creating the operating layer for AI-powered decision making connecting data, documents, workflows, and expert knowledge so teams can move from information to action faster.

**This is not a classic frontend or backend role.** You'll work end-to-end across product, design, engineering, AI workflows, data, and integrations. You'll understand messy business problems, design pragmatic solutions, ship quickly, and improve based on real usage. They're looking for a builder who owns outcomes, not tickets.

**Our client operates in complex, high-stakes business environments** where decisions depend on large amounts of unstructured information, disconnected systems, and domain-specific knowledge. You'll help build an architectural intelligence layer that is agentic, modular, and domain-aware.

**What you will do as an AI-Native Product Engineer...**

* **Own Problems End-to-End**: Take product problems from discovery to production with full ownership
* **User Understanding**: Deeply understand user problems, workflows, and constraints to inform solutions
* **Fullstack Development**: Design and build features across UI, backend, database, APIs, and integrations
* **AI Workflow Development**: Build AI-powered workflows using LLMs, retrieval, agents, structured extraction, and tool use
* **Data Integration**: Work with documents, data sources, and enterprise systems for comprehensive solutions
* **Rapid Iteration**: Ship quickly, test with users, and iterate based on real feedback and usage patterns
* **Product Quality**: Ensure quality across UX, performance, reliability, security, and maintainability
* **AI-Augmented Development**: Use AI coding tools as part of daily workflow for accelerated delivery
* **Pattern Recognition**: Turn repeated customer patterns into scalable product features

**What we are looking for…**

* **Fullstack Engineering**: Strong skills with TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and Postgres
* **Shipping Track Record**: Built and shipped real products end-to-end in production environments
* **Problem-to-Product**: Can move from problem to working product without needing detailed specs
* **Ambiguity Tolerance**: Comfortable with uncertainty and fast iteration cycles
* **UX Thinking**: Think deeply about user experience, not just technical implementation
* **Architecture Focus**: Care about clean architecture, good abstractions, and production reliability
* **AI Product Knowledge**: Understand how modern AI products are built beyond simple prompting
* **Technical Breadth**: Experience with APIs, data models, permissions, background jobs, and integrations
* **Product Judgment**: Strong product sense with ability to challenge unclear requirements constructively
* **Communication**: Clear communicator with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* **Self-Direction**: Highly self-directed with ownership mindset—acts without waiting to be told

**Benefits and perks…**

* **Category-Defining Product**: Build the operating layer for AI-powered decision-making from the ground up
* **End-to-End Ownership**: Full autonomy over product problems from discovery to production
* **AI-Native Environment**: Work with cutting-edge AI capabilities—agents, LLMs, and structured intelligence
* **Startup Impact**: Early-stage opportunity where your contributions directly shape the platform and company
* **Berlin-Based Team**: Collaborative startup environment with engineering-first culture

title: UX Designer
description:
We are on a mission to become the leading international force in residential property management. What we do matters to billions of people in their everyday lives.
   

  

 Residential real estate is the world’s largest asset class, and for most families, buying a home is the single biggest financial decision they will ever make. For too long, residential property management has fallen short of homeowners' and residents' expectations, and the industry is ready for change. Odevo was formed to make that change happen.
   

  

 In just six years, Odevo has grown more than 70-fold, establishing us as the leading international player. We are more than 12,000 people across the US, the UK, the Nordics, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Mexico, and Italy building Odevo. Together, we aspire to break new ground through innovation and cultivate a workplace where we help each other succeed, where ideas matter more than titles, and where kindness is a strength.
   

  

 By combining the power of people and technology, we set a new standard for how homes are managed. Our technology-enabled services simplify living for residents and create a better experience for property owners and boards.
   

  

 Our ambition is to continue our fast-growing journey through new customers, service expansion, and by partnering with great companies that share our mindset and ambition, both in existing and new markets.
   

  

 As we continue to grow, we stay true to who we are, challenge unnecessary bureaucracy, and keep decision-making close to our customers.
   

  

 If you share our mindset and ambition, we’d love you to join us and help accelerate our mission together.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re looking for a UX Designer with strong AI experience to help shape not only the products we design, but also how design is practiced, specified, scaled, and implemented across our global product organisation.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to join an industry still in an early stage of digital maturity, where you can have a significant impact. We see customer experience as a critical differentiator and an important part of our ambition to transform the global property management industry.
   

  

 You’ll join a global design team led by the Head of CX & UX in Stockholm, Sweden. This role combines hands-on UX and interaction design in our AI team with helping the wider design team scale quality, consistency, design systems, and AI-assisted product development workflows globally. You will collaborate with the global design team and support knowledge sharing across all our markets, including the UK, Europe, the US, and Mexico. As part of this role, you will shape both intuitive customer-facing experiences and complex internal workflows for property management employees.
   

  

 You will help mature how our design team works across markets, products, and disciplines. This includes improving design system structure, documentation, governance, and adoption; defining practical quality standards; and establishing clearer ways of working across Figma, design specifications, no-code tools, and AI-assisted development workflows.
   

  

 AI will be central to how we evolve our design practice going forward, balancing the efficiency of AI agents with the judgement, taste, and craft of experienced designers. Experience in both DesignOps and AI-assisted design and development will therefore be a strong advantage.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Work and lead the “ordinary” design process within product teams - translating user needs, business goals, and technical constraints into clear flows, prototypes, interaction design to test and learn iteratively.
* Define design practices for agent driven development workflows, and how design artefacts should be specified so they can be used effectively by designers, product managers, engineers, and agents. Eg specification formats, reusable prompts, design skills, MCPs, and validation methods.
* Define how design artefacts — such as user flows, service blueprints, prototypes, component specifications, interaction rules, and acceptance criteria — can better steer and validate AI-assisted implementation.
* Support more efficient research and validation practices, like how we evaluate product iterations and AI-generated outputs against user needs, design system standards, accessibility expectations, and product quality criteria. This includes, for example, defining/creating tools for research planning, recruitment processes, GDPR considerations, research templates, and maintaining a research repository.
* Lead the work with the Odevo design system(s) by improving component documentation, governance, accessibility standards, usage guidance, and alignment between design components/patterns and code.


**Who You Are**
 You are genuinely interested in understanding people’s needs, behaviours, and motivations, and you use that insight to shape services that deliver real value. You combine strong design craft with systems thinking and can move comfortably between user needs, business outcomes, service journeys, and detailed interaction design.
   

  

 You strive for quality, value collaboration over prestige, and enjoy contributing to a strong team culture. You are a strong communicator who can turn research insights and design rationale into shared understanding across teams and stakeholders.
   

  

 You enjoy making design work more legible, scalable, and repeatable. You care about the craft of design, but also about the systems, rituals, documentation, and standards that help teams deliver good design consistently. You are comfortable moving between hands-on product design and improving the underlying ways of working that support the wider design organisation.
   

  

 You are pragmatic about AI: curious and experimental, but also thoughtful about quality, trust, transparency, human oversight, and when AI should or should not be used.
   

  

**Experience**
* 5+ years of experience as a UX Designer, Product Designer, or similar role, working on complex digital products.
* Bachelor’s degree in design, HCI, behavioural science, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Strong proficiency in Figma, prototyping, interaction design, UX research, service design, and design systems.
* Experience designing web and mobile products for complex, data-rich, workflow-heavy, or operational environments.
* Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams with product managers, engineers, designers, and stakeholders.
* Experience contributing to DesignOps and design systems, including documentation, governance, quality standards, tooling, ResearchOps, and alignment between design and code.
* Experience with AI-driven design or development workflows, including how structured specifications, component rules, interaction logic, and acceptance criteria can guide AI-assisted implementation.
* Experience designing AI-enabled product experiences, such as intelligent search, automation, recommendations, copilots, or decision-support tools.
* Property management or proptech experience is a plus.


**What We Offer**
* Professional growth - to work with the most talented developers in the industry.
* Modern technology - we invest in the latest technologies and tools and encourage our team members to share their ideas and take ownership of their work.
* Innovation - to work on exciting projects that push the boundaries of our industry and make a real impact.
* Commitment to quality - a dynamic and forward-thinking company that values profitable and long-term product development.


**Sounds like you?** 
 Apply today!
   

  

 #msl
   

  

 From 30 K to 2,2 million homes under Management in 5 years
   

  

 year est.

 colleagues
