title: UX Researcher
description:
**TL;DR –** 
 We’re looking for a curious, fast-moving UX Researcher to help shape the future of Lovable. You’ll uncover how users think, feel, and act, turning insights into product direction. You’ll design studies, test concepts, and experiment with new AI-assisted ways of learning from users, helping us move fast without compromising on craft.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
 We’re looking for a researcher who balances
 **curiosity and rigor** 
 — someone who loves asking
 *why* 
 , tests
 *how* 
 , and measures
 *what’s working* 
 . You’re as comfortable in a user interview as you are interpreting event data or survey results, and you know how to connect human stories with product metrics.
   

  

* 3–6 years of experience in UX research, human-centered design, or a related role.
* Proficiency in qualitative methods (interviews, usability testing, concept testing).
* Experience with survey design, data analysis, and working with behavioral data (e.g., from analytics tools) is a plus
* Strong synthesis skills, distilling findings into insights that influence design and product decisions.
* Excellent communication and storytelling skills to bring research to life for cross-functional teams.
* Comfortable in fast-paced, iterative environments with shifting priorities.
* Experience working closely with designers, PMs, and data scientists.


**What You’ll Do**
 In one sentence:
   

  

**Turn user insights into product direction that shapes how the world builds software.**
* Partner with product, design, growth and data teams to define learning goals for upcoming features and experiments.
* Explore new AI-driven approaches for recruiting, analysis, and synthesis — expanding how we learn from users.
* Conduct user sessions directly with Lovable users, gathering firsthand insights into behaviors, motivations, and unmet needs.
* Collaborate with data scientists to interpret behavioral data and validate qualitative findings.
* Contribute to building research frameworks, templates, and best practices for scalable discovery at Lovable.


**How We Hire**
* Fill out a short form and hop on a quick intro call with our recruiting team
* Meet designers and PMs to discuss your approach to research
* Walk through past work and real examples of your process
* Final conversations with product leadership


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English — it’s our company language.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally, so please apply through our careers portal.

title: Product Designer
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses - including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others - rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 



  





 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 



  





 At Sinch we "Dream Big", "Win Together", "Keep it simple", and "Make it Happen". These values are our foundation!
 



  





**DESCRIPTION** 




  





 We're looking for a Product Designer to shape the future of our Conversational AI domain. In this role, you'll help lead the design and evolution of AI experiences across the agentic orchestration core, bot templates, and campaign creation, while setting the direction for how conversations are built and managed. You'll play a defining role in our next-generation LLM-powered conversational experiences and serve as a leading voice in how we approach AI-assisted product design.
 



  





 With a fresh brand, ongoing UI modernization, and strong support from product and engineering, there's real space to make a lasting impact. You'll help elevate the product from good enough to genuinely great, while mentoring others and raising the bar for design craft across the team. You'll own end-to-end design strategy and execution for your product area, from problem framing to production-ready work.
 



  




* Design & Innovate: Lead the design of next-generation conversational AI and bot-building experiences - intuitive, flexible, and built for scale.
* UX Discovery & Research: Lead discovery initiatives to uncover user insights and drive impactful research. Share findings clearly and help the team run measurable experiments to guide product direction.
* Collaboration & Stakeholder Engagement: Work closely with product, engineering, and cross functional partners to bring design visions to life. Build strong relationships and advocate clearly for the best user outcomes.
* Embrace Ambiguity: Approach uncertainty with curiosity - create clarity through validation, rigorous collaboration, and user insights, guiding the team toward actionable decisions in complex situations.
* UX/UI Strategy: Define and execute a scalable design strategy for the Orchestration domain that aligns with company goals and enhances user experience.
* Usability Testing & Metrics: Establish and monitor key usability and engagement metrics to assess design effectiveness and drive continuous improvement.
* Design System Contribution: Actively contributes to the design system to improve consistency, accessibility, and scalability across the product.
* Thought Leadership: Serve as a subject matter expert in UX for conversational AI and orchestration, sharing insights both internally and externally.



  





**REQUIREMENTS** 




  




* Extensive product design experience in B2B SaaS, ideally with a strong focus on complex workflow tools, conversational AI, or developer-facing products.  Proven ability to define and execute design strategy that enhances product growth and aligns with business goals - not just delivery, but direction.
* Deep design craft across layout, typography, interaction, and visual systems, with a clear point of view and the skill to execute at a senior level.
* Strong UX discovery and research skills - able to lead initiatives, run experiments, and translate findings into product decisions.
* Exceptional communication and collaborative skills, working effectively with diverse teams including product, engineering, and senior stakeholders.  Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with a customer-focused, outcome-driven approach.
* Expert-level Figma proficiency and extensive experience working with and contributing to design systems.
* A portfolio that demonstrates strategic thinking - how you frame complex problems, make trade-offs, and drive toward great solutions.
* Keen interest in AI and discovering new ways to apply it - both in your own workflow and in the products you design.



  





**Nice to Have** 




  




* Hands-on experience designing chatbot builders, orchestration tools, or conversational AI platforms.
* Familiarity with LLM-powered product experiences and the unique design challenges they introduce.
* Experience with growth mechanics such as onboarding, activation, conversion, and retention. Background in or curiosity about developer tools or technical user personas.



  





 Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in
 **English** 
 .
 



  





 This position can be based hybrid out of our hubs in Antwerp (Belgium), Stockholm or Malmö (Sweden), or Madrid (Spain).
 



  





 Please note: candidates must already reside in and have the legal right to work in the chosen country.
 



  





 At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation at this time.
 



  





**OUR HIRING PROCESS** 




  





 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 



  





 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!
 



  





**Salary:** 




  





 The monthly salary range for this position varies by office location. Factors which may affect pay within this range may include skills, education, experience, and other qualifications.
 



  




* Belgium (Antwerp Hub): between EURO 5,000 to EURO 6,000
* Spain (Madrid Hub): EURO 3,000 to Euro 4,000
* Sweden (Stockholm / Malmö): SEK 43,000 to SEK 54,000

title: Senior Product Designer (UX/UI)
description:
**Senior Product Designer – Consulting Assignment within Consumer Digital Products**
 Are you passionate about creating innovative digital products and customer experiences that make a real impact? We at WeQuel are currently looking for a Senior Product Designer for a consulting assignment with one of our clients. This is an exciting opportunity to shape the future of digital products in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment where design plays a strategic role in business success.
   

  

 As a consultant with us, you will have the opportunity to work with some of our clients who are leading companies within the pharmaceutical, manufacturing, and industrial sectors, contributing to process optimization, implementation of new technologies, and the development of sustainable solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Senior Product Designer, you will lead user-centered design initiatives from early discovery through delivery. Working closely with product managers, engineers, and business stakeholders, you will help define product strategy, facilitate workshops, validate ideas with users, and translate insights into intuitive and engaging digital experiences.
   

  

 This role requires both strategic thinking and hands-on design expertise. You will navigate complex stakeholder environments, drive innovation initiatives, and contribute to the creation of new digital products, services, and customer experiences. You will also explore how emerging technologies, including AI, can create meaningful value for both customers and the business.
   

  

**Your main responsibilities will include:**
* Lead end-to-end product design activities from discovery to delivery
* Facilitate workshops, discovery sessions, and user-centered design processes
* Conduct user research, concept development, prototyping, and usability testing
* Design intuitive user experiences and high-quality user interfaces
* Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and cross-functional teams
* Translate customer insights into actionable product improvements and new concepts
* Drive innovation by identifying opportunities for AI-enabled products and services
* Develop scalable design solutions across digital customer journeys
* Present design concepts and facilitate discussions with senior stakeholders
* Contribute to product strategy and long-term experience vision


**We are looking for someone who:**
* Has extensive experience as a Product Designer, UX Designer, or Digital Experience Designer
* Has senior-level experience leading design work in complex stakeholder environments
* Has proven experience designing and launching AI-powered products, services, or customer experiences
* Can identify opportunities where AI creates meaningful customer and business value
* Has strong expertise in UX design, UI design, interaction design, and design thinking
* Is experienced in user research, concept development, prototyping, experimentation, and usability testing
* Has a track record of creating new products, services, or customer experiences—not only optimizing existing ones.
* Has strong strategic UX and systems thinking capabilities
* Can design end-to-end experiences across digital, physical, and service touchpoints
* Is experienced in facilitating workshops and discovery sessions
* Has strong stakeholder management, storytelling, and communication skills
* Has experience collaborating closely with Product, Engineering, Data Science, and other cross-functional teams
* Has excellent knowledge of Figma, Miro, Microsoft Teams, and modern digital collaboration tools
* Is fluent in English, both written and spoken. Swedish is meritorious


**We Offer:**
 At WeQuel, you become part of a consulting team that values people first – we believe that success is built through engagement, collaboration, and development. We offer a flat organization with short decision-making paths, a strong sense of community, and the opportunity to influence your own professional growth.

title: Senior Conversation Designer - Experience Content Design
description:
Come shape the conversational experiences at the heart of Spotify's AI-driven products. You'll design how people talk with Spotify — the flows, the voice, the moment-to-moment interactions that make AI feel natural, useful, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of writing and system design. You'll bring sharp editorial instincts and real writing chops, but you'll spend your time designing how conversations work — not producing UI copy. Whether you come from editorial, linguistics, interaction design, or an engineering background with a strong feel for language, you'll have room to experiment, prototype, and define how the next generation of Spotify products talk back.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Design end-to-end conversational experiences — dialogue flows, turn-taking, state and context handling, error and recovery paths, and multi-turn interactions across Spotify's AI products.
* Engineer and refine the prompts that drive generative and conversational features, shaping model behavior to produce accurate, reliable, and useful outputs.
* Translate product requirements into conversational system design — defining how the model interprets intent, retains context, and decides what to do across a flow.
* Prototype with large language models to probe model behaviors, constraints, and failure modes, and turn what you learn into more capable experiences.
* Build evaluation frameworks to measure and improve conversation quality, accuracy, task completion, and user impact.
* Partner with product managers, engineers, researchers, designers, and the content design team to bring AI systems into cohesive, human-centered products.
* Define guardrails for safe, reliable model behavior across AI-driven interactions.
* Help raise the bar for conversation design craft on the team, guiding peers and contributing to shared patterns, evaluation methods, and documentation.


 Who you are
   

  

* Technically literate and curious — comfortable working with LLMs, APIs, and structured formats (e.g. JSON, YAML, or Python).
* Practiced at testing and improving conversational systems or prompts through data, feedback, and experimentation.
* Energized by ambiguity, creativity, and the challenge of defining new interaction paradigms in a fast-moving AI landscape.
* A strong writer and editor with excellent editorial judgment, who applies those instincts to conversational systems rather than to traditional content or UI copy.
* A strong cross-functional collaborator who balances technical possibility with creative vision.
* Familiar with accessibility, localization, regulatory compliance, and safety in digital experiences.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Full-Stack Design Technologist
description:
Above is looking for two talented hires (Intermediate/Senior) to join our Design Technology team in either our Malmö or Stockholm studio – one hardware-leaning, one software-leaning. Both positions are full-time roles.
   

  

 This is the job ad for the Full-Stack Design Technologist role. If you’re a fit for both roles, you’re welcome to submit a parallel application for the Experience Prototype Architect role.
   

  

**The role**
 As an Full-Stack Design Technologist at Above, you will work with multi-disciplinary project teams on a wide variety of cutting-edge design & innovation projects for some of the world's most exciting brands. You will be an integral part of our design team, proactively contributing across the full design process – from research to concept definition, from technical explorations to crafting compelling concept prototypes and strategic narratives.
   

  

 You enjoy working inside design problems – not just implementing solutions. You’re curious about the “why” behind decisions, and you’re motivated to develop taste, critique, and craft over time.
   

  

 Our work spans consumer products, smart home devices, robotics, future mobility experiences, spatial experiences, and more. We create impact across all levels and horizons – from category-defining hero products to multi-dimensional portfolio strategies and shaping compelling future visions alike.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Design Technology is in rapid transition. AI tools accelerate iteration, but they don’t replace the hard parts: judgment, direction-setting, and knowing what’s worth prototyping, validating, and shipping.
   

  

 We value broad tool fluency and curiosity, and using experience prototypes (and other formats when needed) to move projects forward.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Proactively contribute across the design process, from research to concept definition
* Run technical explorations, and craft compelling concept prototypes and strategic narratives
* Shape excellent project deliveries through craft, creativity, and conceptual thinking
* Drive smaller engagements independently, and integrate into larger projects as part of diverse, cross-functional teams
* Act as an ambassador of the design technology discipline within project teams


 What we are looking for
   

  

 We are looking for inspiring, forward-thinking portfolios that display an integrated approach of design, technology, and creativity.
   

  

**Core strengths**
* Preferably 3+ years of professional experience, and familiarity with fast-paced agency environments / workflows
* Forward-thinking approach to technology, with a keen interest in emerging trends and future developments
* Comfortable leading conversations with stakeholders and experts across design, business, and engineering
* Ability to structure ambiguous work and choose the right tools/fidelity at each stage
* Strong craft + conceptual thinking, paired with clear communication and storytelling
* Demonstrated curiosity for design craft (interaction, visual, industrial, or service) – and an appetite to grow it further
* A humble, self-propelled, collaborative team player in multi-competence constellations
* Positive impact and sustainability mindset


**Technical Toolkit (in Order Of Importance)**
*You do not need to tick every box – we’re looking for strong depth in some areas and curiosity to learn the rest.*
* Proven track record in developing interactive systems
* Troubleshooting skills, particularly in bridging design and technical domains
* Knowledge of local and distributed network architectures
* API and integration design
* Modern full-stack: TypeScript, React / Next.js, Node, Python
* Daily fluency with AI coding/prototyping tools: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Weavy, etc.
* AI-native application development: shipping on LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, open models), agent frameworks, tool use, structured generation, streaming/generative UI, writing evals, A/B-ing prompts, model selection, MCP design
* Demonstrated skills and experiences in Game engines (Unity / Unreal)
* Bonus: voice/audio interfaces, computer vision, video editing, physical computing


**A Bit About Above**
 We are a Scandinavian innovation agency dedicated to driving positive change through the integration of design, strategy and technology. Our creative 360-approach allows us to break down boundaries between the physical and digital, while fusing hardware & software into meaningful experiences.
   

  

 We work with leading global brands, local Scandinavian heroes, and a fantastic collection of startups. We’re a team of warm, welcoming, dedicated professionals with diverse, international backgrounds. In everything we do, we strive for a world-class result and believe you share that mindset. You'll join a team that values collaboration, creativity, and driving tangible impact through thoughtful design!
   

  

**Join our team**
 Please submit your portfolio and short motivation statement.
   

  

**Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.**
 If you have any questions regarding the job posting or application process, please send an e-mail to Alexander Pospischil, Director of Design Technology at Above.
   

  

 Interviews with shortlisted candidates will start as soon as possible.
   

  

 We are excited to receive international applications, and are generally able to assist with work permit & relocation processes.
   

  

 Let’s build what’s next – thoughtfully, collaboratively, and hands-on.

title: Product Manager
description:
**About Fika Jobs** 




 At a time when so much of AI in recruitment is focused on speed and efficiency, candidates are often reduced to CVs, keywords and optimized applications.
 



  





 Fika Jobs is making a different bet.
 



  





 We believe the future of hiring should put candidates front and center.
 



  





 Instead of asking people to compress who they are into a CV and cover letter, Fika Jobs lets candidates tell their story through an AI conversation: what they have built, what they are great at, what drives them and what kind of work they want to do next.
 



  





 The result is a richer, more human profile that helps companies understand the person behind the application.
 



  





 We recently announced our $4M pre-seed round and are building a small, A\* team with people from companies like Spotify, Klarna and King.
 



  





 Now we are looking for exceptional people who want to join early, take real ownership and do the best work of their lives.
 



  





**The role** 




 We are looking for a Product Manager to help shape the core product experience at Fika Jobs.
 



  





 You will work closely with founders, design, engineering, AI and users to understand real problems, define what we should build and turn ideas into products people love.
 



  





 This is not a project management role. We are looking for someone with exceptional product judgment, strong user empathy and extremely high agency - someone who can think clearly, move fast and take ownership from insight to shipped product.
 



  





**What you'll own** 



* Help define and build the core product experience for candidates and companies
* Understand user needs through conversations, data and product usage
* Turn messy problems into clear product decisions and priorities
* Work closely with design, engineering and AI to ship high-quality product fast
* Translate customer and candidate insights into better product direction
* Help define what great product work looks like at Fika Jobs



  





**Who you are** 



* You have strong product judgment and care deeply about users
* You have extremely high agency and take ownership without waiting for instructions
* You can turn ambiguity into clear priorities and thoughtful product decisions
* You care about speed, quality and business impact
* You want to join a small, A\* team and do the best work of your life



  





**Why join Fika Jobs** 




 This is a chance to help shape a product that could redefine how people find work.
 



  





 You will have significant freedom, direct access to the founders and the opportunity to influence product direction from the beginning.
 



  





 There is very little bureaucracy, no endless approval chains and no hiding behind narrow responsibilities. You will be trusted to understand problems deeply, make decisions and help ship products that matter.
 



  





 This is a role for people who want to work close to users, technology and company strategy - and help build a product people genuinely care about.
 



  





**How to apply** 




 No cover letter needed.
 



  





 Apply using the link and take our AI conversation. It is your chance to tell your story in your own words - how you think about product, what you have built, how you make decisions and what you want to do next.
 



  





 The conversation helps us get to know the person behind the CV.
 



  





 Just be yourself. We would much rather hear how you think than read another polished application.

title: Design Engineer
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You care deeply about how products feel. Not just how they work, but how they
 *look, respond, and guide users* 
 . At your previous role, you were probably the person who noticed the small details others missed, the awkward interaction, the unnecessary friction, the moment where the product could have been better.
   

  

 At Tandem, you’ll bring that mindset to healthcare, a space where most software still feels slow, clunky, and frustrating to use. You’ll help us change that!
   

  

 As a Design Engineer, you’ll work closely with designers, product, and other engineers to build experiences that are fast, intuitive, and genuinely enjoyable to use. Your core strength lies in frontend development, crafting high-quality user interfaces - while still being comfortable working across the stack when needed. You’ll take ideas from rough concepts to polished features in production, with a strong sense of ownership over both the technical implementation and the final user experience.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who moves quickly, has strong product taste, and cares about getting the details right - because those details are what make a product feel great.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Own and ship user-facing features end-to-end, from early concept to polished production experience.
* Work closely with designers to translate ideas into high-quality, interactive UI, and iterate quickly based on feedback.
* Build and maintain fast, responsive, and scalable frontend applications, primarily using modern web technologies.
* Contribute across the stack when needed - integrating APIs, shaping data flows, and ensuring a smooth end-to-end experience.
* Continuously refine and improve the product by identifying friction, inconsistencies, and opportunities for better UX.
* Take ownership of UI quality, performance, and consistency across the product.
* Use the best modern tools (including AI-assisted development) to ship high-quality features quickly.


 What You Bring
   

  

* Strong experience building modern frontend applications with TypeScript and React.
* A clear strength and interest in frontend development - you care deeply about UI, performance, and user experience.
* A sharp eye for design, interaction, and detail, you care about spacing, motion, responsiveness, and polish.
* A product mindset - you think in terms of user outcomes, not just technical tasks.
* Ability to move quickly from idea to implementation, with a high degree of ownership.
* Comfort working across the stack when needed (e.g. APIs, backend integrations).
* Experience shipping production systems and understanding how to balance speed with quality.
* Strong collaboration skills - you enjoy working closely with designers and other engineers.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience in the healthcare industry or with health-related applications.
* Experience working in design-heavy or product-led teams.
* Familiarity with tools like Figma and ability to collaborate closely on design systems.
* Experience building LLM-powered interfaces or AI-driven products.


 Location
   

  

 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

 How to Apply
   

  

 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineering team
* System Design Interview at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a Product focused System Design interview to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.
* Follow-up interview with our CTO & Co-Founder


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag) plus an additional 6,000 SEK yearly to spend on other health related initiatives
* Generous Parental leave top-up for new parents
* Private Medical Insurance to stay healthy
* Mental health support through our partner Mindler
* Pension program
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Senior UI Designer & Flutter Developer
description:
We are setting up a dream team of developers and builders to create the next-generation server framework for Flutter. Take this unique opportunity to get in on the ground level, get equity in the company, and create the server technology of the future. Serverpod is a scalable app server for the rapidly growing Flutter community. It was founded by a former Google engineer with previous startup experience who worked at the Flutter team in Silicon Valley.
   

  

*This position is primarily on site in our Stockholm office, but we can make exceptions for extraordinary candidates.*
**You Will**
* Work with other rockstar developers with experience from Google, Spotify, Minecraft, and other large companies.
* Drive the UI design of our customer-facing Flutter app with a best-in-class user and developer experience.


**We Think That You**
* Have very strong design skills (you must have a portfolio to show).
* Have professional experience from Dart and Flutter development, or are a quick learner.
* Are comfortable working remotely or in person.
* Want to build something big.


**Bonus If You Also**
* Have a degree in computer science.
* Are great at editing videos.
* Have given tech talks, or it is a skill you want to master.


 Serverpod is headquartered in the heart of Stockholm at Medborgarplatsen. Rooted in a rich Scandinavian tech culture, we pride ourselves on fostering an environment of creativity, continuous learning, and excellence.

title: Data Scientist
description:
**TL;DR -** 
 We are looking for a data scientist to build Lovable's data and analytics muscle. You'll work cross-functionally across all teams to level up our understanding of users, uncover opportunities and empower everyone with the insights they need for data-driven decision making. Must combine analytical rigor with the ability to turn complex data into winning product bets.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* A business-minded data scientist who's excited to level up our analytics efforts: metrics frameworks, behavioral models, and hypothesis testing
* Solid technical foundation (SQL, Python, statistical analysis) - comfortable working with data at scale and translating it into insights
* Deep curiosity about user behavior and what actually drives growth and retention
* Ability to move between exploratory analysis, building behavioral models, hypothesis testing, and strategic recommendations


**What You’ll Do**
* Work closely with growth, product, and marketing to identify key levers in the customer journey
* Analyze funnels, cohorts, and user behaviors to surface insights that drive decisions
* Build dashboards, alerts, and automated reporting to keep the team informed and aligned
* Design and analyze experiments (A/B tests, growth tests) to understand, impact and inform strategy
* Monitor data quality and collaborate with engineering to maintain reliability
* Leverage AI tools and automation to scale your analysis and focus on high-impact questions
* Translate data into clear, actionable narratives that drive product and business decisions


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, , infra-as-code (Terraform)


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an initial exploratory call.
* Discuss your experience in more depth during a round of interviews with us.
* Join us for a workshop lasting 1-2 days remote or onsite. We'll see how you tick and you get to meet the team and explore whether joining Lovable feels right for you.


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: Head of Customer Success
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 Tandem Health is scaling across multiple markets, and we are looking for a Head of Customer Success to define what world-class customer success looks like at Tandem.
   

  

 This role is not primarily about building a traditional Customer Success team. Instead, you will set up the foundations, processes, playbooks, rhythms, and standards that enable our teams in every market to deliver an excellent customer experience.
   

  

 You will work closely with our Medical Operations Specialists, Product Delivery Managers, Sales, Product and leadership to ensure customers are successfully onboarded, deeply engaged, continuously supported, and able to realise clear value from Tandem throughout their journey.
   

  

 You will be responsible for turning Customer Success into a repeatable, high-quality discipline across Tandem - helping us retain customers, drive expansion, increase engagement, and create consistently excellent customer relationships across markets.
   

  

 What you will do
   

  

* Define what excellent Customer Success looks like at Tandem
* Rebuild the Customer Success foundations from scratch, including processes, playbooks, rituals, tools, and standards
* Create a clear customer journey across onboarding, adoption, engagement, retention, expansion, and renewal readiness
* Develop practical playbooks for customer onboarding, QBRs, success plans, health checks, escalation management, upsell opportunities, sales collaboration and ongoing engagement
* Coach and train Medical Operations Specialists on how to deliver excellent Customer Success in their markets
* Set the standards for how teams build trust, create value, manage relationships, and keep customers engaged
* Help teams identify opportunities to upsell, expand, and deepen customer adoption
* Create customer health frameworks that help teams spot risk, engagement gaps, and expansion opportunities early
* Build rhythms for customer reviews, internal account discussions, feedback loops, and market-level performance tracking
* Work with Product to ensure customer feedback is captured, structured, and translated into useful insight
* Partner with Sales and Country teams to ensure a strong handover from sale to onboarding and long-term success
* Evangelise Customer Success best practices across all Tandem markets


 What you bring
   

  

* You have built or significantly shaped a Customer Success function at a high-growth B2B SaaS scaleup
* You have created CS processes, playbooks, operating rhythms, system setup and standards from scratch
* You know what great customer onboarding, adoption, retention, engagement, and expansion look like
* You have experience coaching and enabling others to deliver excellent Customer Success
* You are commercially sharp and understand how Customer Success drives upsell, expansion, retention, and customer happiness
* You are highly structured and can turn ambiguity into clear, repeatable ways of working
* You understand SaaS metrics such as adoption, churn, retention, expansion, customer health, time to value, NRR, and GRR
* You are excellent at stakeholder management and can influence teams across countries and functions
* You are comfortable operating across multiple markets and adapting best practices to local contexts


 Bonus points
   

  

* Experience in healthcare, healthtech, clinical software, or another regulated industry
* Experience working with complex B2B customers where success depends on workflow change and behaviour change
* Experience enabling non-CS teams to deliver Customer Success as part of their role
* Experience building customer health scoring, QBR frameworks, onboarding journeys, and renewal processes
* Experience using AI, automation, analytics, or customer intelligence tools to improve Customer Success workflows
* Experience scaling Customer Success best practices across several countries or markets


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This is a
 **full-time role based in Stockholm** 
 where you will work primarily in order to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* First interview with Head of Commercial Excellence
* Second interview with our CEO
* Working Day - Join us in the Stockholm office for a day to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag) plus an additional 6,000 SEK yearly to spend on other health related initiatives
* Generous Parental leave top-up for new parents
* Private Medical Insurance to stay healthy
* Mental health support through our partner Mindler
* Pension program
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Adobe Campaign Architect
description:
**Your Role**
*Join our dynamic Adobe team in Sweden. As a key member of our team, you will:*
* Design and implement solutions in Adobe Campaign Classic and Standard, including workflows, campaign triggers, landing pages, and custom components.
* Collaborate with clients to understand requirements, propose optimal solutions, and deliver high-quality implementations across multiple channels (Email, SMS, Push, Direct Mail).
* Manage integrations with external databases, APIs, and other Adobe Experience Cloud solutions, applying best practices and technical expertise in JavaScript, XML, HTML/CSS.


**Your profile**
* 6+ years of experience with marketing automation platforms, primarily Adobe Campaign Classic and Standard.
* Strong knowledge of multi-channel marketing (Email, SMS, Push, Direct Mail, Outbound).
* 3+ years of hands-on development experience in Adobe Campaign Classic, including integrations with external databases, APIs, and Digital Asset Management (DAM) solutions.
* Proficiency in JavaScript, XML, HTML/CSS and understanding of Adobe best practices.
* Strong communication skills to engage with clients, understand use cases, propose optimal solutions, and deliver high-quality implementations.
* Good knowledge of Swedish or another Scandinavian language.


**About**
**What we believe you will enjoy about working here**
* A competitive salary, favorable occupational pension plans, and collective agreements that provide security, along with a strong focus on your health and well-being, including initiatives to support a healthy work-life balance.
* A work environment where colleagues support and inspire each other, and where managers prioritize your best interests. You’ll also have access to a wide range of career opportunities and Capgemini’s extensive training catalog, especially in the latest technologies such as generative AI and data engineering.
* A company culture that highly values diversity and inclusion, offers opportunities for international careers, and connects you to a fantastic global network of 340,000 colleagues.


**Application**
 Do not hesitate to submit your application. We will be conducting interviews on a rolling basis and look forward to finding our next colleague!
   

  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification and background checks may occasionally be conducted.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Open Innovation Activation Specialist - SynerLeap
description:
At
 **ABB** 
 , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

**This position reports to:**
 Head of Synerleap / ABB VP Startup Collaborations
   

  

 \_\_
   

  

  

**Your Role & Responsibilities**
 Are you passionate about innovation, collaboration, and creating meaningful engagement? As an Open Innovation Activation Specialist, you will play a key role in strengthening the visibility and impact of SynerLeap across ABB and the external innovation ecosystem.
   

  

 In this role, you will ensure that SynerLeap is present in the right internal and external forums, connecting ABB teams with startups, innovation programs, and strategic opportunities. By creating engaging experiences and impactful communication, you will help accelerate open innovation and position ABB as a preferred partner for startups and innovation ecosystems.
   

  

 The work model for this role is: Hybrid
   

  

 As an Open Innovation Activation Specialist, you will:
   

  

* Strengthen SynerLeap's presence across ABB by building relationships with stakeholders, identifying key forums, and driving internal engagement activities aligned with business priorities.
* Increase SynerLeap's visibility in the external innovation ecosystem by coordinating participation in industry events, conferences, and innovation forums while ensuring a consistent and professional representation of ABB.
* Design, plan, and execute internal and external engagement activities such as startup challenges, workshops, showcases, and networking events that connect ABB with startups and innovation initiatives.
* Develop engaging communication and content for internal channels, social media, and digital platforms, highlighting success stories, partnerships, and innovation outcomes while ensuring consistent messaging.
* Collaborate closely with colleagues across Engagement, Scouting, Programs, and Commercialisation teams to align activities with business priorities and maximize the impact of ongoing initiatives.
* Monitor engagement activities and measure success through participation, stakeholder feedback, communication reach, and contribution to innovation programs and business opportunities.


**Qualifications For The Role**
 We are looking for a collaborative and proactive professional who enjoys bringing people, ideas, and opportunities together.
   

  

* Experience in communications, marketing, innovation, ecosystem development, events, or stakeholder engagement.
* Strong project management skills with the ability to coordinate multiple activities simultaneously and deliver high-quality results.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills with experience creating engaging content for different audiences and channels.
* The ability to build relationships and collaborate effectively across functions, cultures, and organizational levels.
* A structured, self-driven, and solution-oriented mindset with a passion for innovation and continuous improvement.
* Excellent written and spoken English.


**More About Us**
 For startups and scaleups, SynerLeap provides a structured pathway into ABB. For venture capital firms, it offers a channel to connect portfolio companies with real industrial opportunities.
   

  

 For universities, accelerators, incubators, and ecosystem partners, it creates opportunities to collaborate with one of the world's largest industrial technology companies.
   

  

 For ABB businesses, it provides access to emerging technologies, new business models, and entrepreneurial thinking that can accelerate growth and competitiveness. In short, SynerLeap serves as ABB's gateway to external innovation
   

  

 Recruiting Manager Kevin Kyer, kevin.kyer@ch.abb.com, will answer your questions about the position. Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Håkan Sjöberg, +46 703 96 00 02; Ledarna: Lenny Larsson, +46 706 32 85 47; Unionen: Katja Saari, +46 730 77 05 02.
   

  

 Please note that to be eligible for employment at ABB Sweden, you will need to pass our pre-employment screening steps. This includes a reference check, a drug test, and could also include an extended background check.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application (PDF documents submitted in English are appreciated).
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact?
   

  

 Apply today or visit
 **https://www.abb.com** 
 to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

title: Frontendutvecklare
description:
Hos oss får du arbeta i ett tight team där du kombinerar teknik och konsultmässighet. Du är med hela vägen från dialog och behovsanalys till implementation och vidareutveckling och bidrar aktivt i samtal där du rådgör kring lösningar och prioriteringar som skapar verkligt värde för våra kunder.
   

  

 Rollen innebär att du arbetar både i teamleveranser och i expertuppdrag hos kund, där din förmåga att växla mellan hands-on utveckling och strategisk rådgivning är central.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker en frontendutvecklare med några års erfarenhet som kombinerar teknisk spets med stark konsultmässighet. Du är trygg i din kompetens och drivs av att skapa användarvärde genom smarta, hållbara och tillgängliga lösningar. I rollen ansvarar du för att utveckla moderna frontendlösningar och bidrar samtidigt aktivt i dialog kring lösningar, prioriteringar och tekniska vägval tillsammans med kund och team.
   

  

**Du kommer även att:**
* Utveckla moderna frontendlösningar med fokus på användarupplevelse, prestanda och skalbarhet.
* Ta en ledande roll där du navigerar tekniska utmaningar och skapar förtroende hos kund.
* Samarbeta tätt med designers, UX:are, backendutvecklare och projektledare i teamleveranser.
* Översätta verksamhetsbehov till intuitiva och tillgängliga gränssnitt.
* Säkerställa kvalitet, struktur och långsiktig hållbarhet i leveranser.
* Bidra i tidiga kunddialoger och forma lösningsförslag.
* Mentorstötta kollegor och bidra till kunskapsdelning i teamet.


**Din profil**
 Tekniken är ditt verktyg, men din styrka ligger i att se helheten och skapa värde i varje del av leveransen.
   

  

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av frontendutveckling i komplexa projekt.
* Erfaren inom moderna ramverk som React, Vue eller Angular.
* Starka kunskaper i JavaScript och TypeScript samt best practices kring struktur och underhåll.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga tillgängliga lösningar enligt WCAG.
* Van att arbeta agilt och nära både team och kund.
* Trygg i konsultrollen och i dialog med olika typer av intressenter.
* Erfarenhet av Git och ett DevOps-orienterat arbetssätt.


**Meriterande**
* Docker.
* Erfarenhet av Azure eller andra molntjänster.
* CMS- och e-handelsplattformar som Optimizely, Litium, Umbraco eller inRiver PIM.
* Testdriven utveckling (TDD) och verktyg som Jest eller Cypress.
* Byggverktyg som Vite, Webpack eller liknande.


**Varför Knowit Experience?**
 Hos oss är medarbetaren i centrum. Du blir en del av en inkluderande och kreativ miljö där din utveckling står i fokus.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder:**
* Tillgång till ett inspirerande nätverk med närmare 350 kollegor inom Experience.
* En trygg anställning med kollektivavtal, generösa och proaktiva hälso- och friskvårdsupplägg samt pensions- och försäkringsförmåner.
* En miljö som främjar och värdesätter initiativ och kompetensutveckling.
* En arbetsplats som värdesätter balans mellan arbete och fritid samt aktivt arbetar med jämställdhet, miljö och hållbarhet.
* Vi tror på samarbete, öppenhet och ständig förbättring och hos oss har du möjlighet att påverka både din egen och vår gemensamma utveckling.


**Ansökan**
 Låter detta som du? Då vill vi gärna höra från dig! Har du frågor om rollen eller om oss på Knowit? Tveka inte att kontakta Sandra Skilberg.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!

title: Senior Manager Consumer Experience
description:
At Swedish Match we’ve chosen to do something incredible. We’re totally transforming our business and building our future on one clear purpose – to deliver a smoke-free future. Swedish Match is an affiliate of PMI and have been a leader in the industry for more than 200 years.
   

  

 In the Nordic region, we are 1,800 employees based in Sweden, Denmark, Finland and Norway working in various functions and teams and together we are collaborating to deliver a smoke-free Nordics.
   

  

 Role Summary
   

  

 As Senior Manager of Consumer Experience, you will play a key role in shaping and driving the market’s multi-category direction and translating it into impactful initiatives and consumer programs across nicotine categories in Sweden. You will bring together category and commercial priorities into clear, integrated plans, working closely with Category teams, Commercial teams, and Channel owners to strengthen business performance and deliver a cohesive omnichannel consumer experience.
   

  

 You will be responsible for turning strategic priorities into actionable plans and ensuring strong coordination across functions to enable effective execution. The role involves close collaboration across the organisation, connecting category priorities with commercial opportunities and channel execution to deliver a focused and impactful market approach.
   

  

 You will also lead the planning and delivery of omnichannel consumer programs from concept through to implementation within a project-based environment. In addition, you will drive local initiatives, particularly within the oral category, where solutions may be partly or fully market-specific.
   

  

 As a senior leader, you will contribute to and drive the commercial governance agenda, working closely with Strategy & Portfolio Development and PMO to ensure alignment, clarity, and successful execution.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Own and guide the market’s multi-category roadmap, setting priorities aligned with business objectives, category strategies, and commercial opportunities
* Partner with Category teams, Commercial teams, and Channel owners to shape and execute the multi-category agenda
* Lead the development and delivery of consumer programs and omnichannel initiatives, from concept through to follow-up
* Drive prioritisation and governance of initiatives, ensuring clear ownership and effective use of resources
* Oversee execution of multi-category commercial programs, balancing impact, efficiency, and business needs
* Ensure initiatives are effectively activated in-market and continuously improved based on performance and insights
* Strengthen cross-functional ways of working to enable efficient and aligned delivery
* Contribute to a consumer-focused, collaborative, and high-performing team environment


**Qualifications & Experience**
* Degree in Business, Marketing, Economics, or a related field
* 10+ years of experience within consumer experience, commercial, or marketing roles (FMCG or retail preferred)
* Experience working with consumer insights and data to inform and drive business outcomes
* Understanding of consumer experience management (e.g. customer journeys, NPS, omnichannel engagement)
* Strong analytical mindset and ability to translate insights into clear, meaningful recommendations
* Experience leading cross-functional projects or programs, ideally within agile environments
* Familiarity with route-to-market strategies and omnichannel execution (digital, retail, customer care)
* Experience in leadership, coaching, or developing others


 What Success Looks Like
   

  

 You bring together curiosity, insight, and business understanding to turn consumer feedback and data into meaningful actions that improve the overall experience. You combine strategic thinking with a strong sense of priorities and execution, enabling you to navigate complex initiatives with clarity and impact. You collaborate naturally across teams, contribute to an inclusive and supportive environment, and help ensure a high standard of delivery across retail, customer care, and sales.
   

  

*Please note that relocation support is available for this role.*
 What we offer
   

  

 Our Success Depends On The Dedicated People Who Come To Work Every Single Day With a Sense Of Purpose And An Appetite For Progress. Join Swedish Match And You Too Can
   

  

* Seize the freedom to define your future and ours. We’ll empower you to take risks, experiment and explore.
* Be part of an inclusive, diverse culture, where everyone’s contribution is respected; collaborate with some of the world’s best people and feel like you belong.
* Enjoy flexibility of hybrid way of working - split your time between working from our office or the comfort of your home, where it works best for you in line with business needs.
* Pursue your ambitions and develop your skills with a global business – our staggering size and scale provides endless opportunities to progress.
* Take pride in delivering our promise to society: to deliver a smoke-free future.


 #SWMA
   

  

**27513**

title: Data Scientist I
description:
**Work with us towards a greener future**
 Climate change is a reality. As a mobility provider, we recognise our impact on the environment and are determined to play our part in contributing to sustainable solutions. And it’s so exciting – we’re well on our way on our journey towards full electrification. If you share our commitment for creating a positive environmental impact, then join us in our mission to advance towards a greener future.
   

  

 Let's introduce ourselves
   

  

 This role will join Commercial & Marketing Data, a team at the center of how Volvo Cars turns data into commercial impact across the full customer journey, from first interest to lasting loyalty. We are responsible for advancing data maturity, insights, and data science across the commercial landscape by building reusable, governed, and high-quality data products that make decision-making and product development more scalable, reliable, and effective.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 As a Data Scientist in our Commercial Analytics & Data Science team, you will apply data science and machine learning to create decision-grade insights and predictive signals that improve how we understand and serve customers across key journeys.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Build, validate, and maintain predictive models that generate decision-grade signals across commercial customer journeys (e.g., churn and propensity), and adapt the modeling focus as priorities evolve (e.g., acquisition, conversion, retention, CRM/campaign optimization, channel optimization).
* Translate business questions into measurable targets, features, and modeling approaches (classification, survival/time-to-event, uplift/causal approaches when applicable).
* Engineer and curate features from enterprise customer and commercial datasets (e.g., identity resolution, event histories, ownership/service signals, digital behavior, CRM/campaign touchpoints, channel interactions), in collaboration with data engineering and domain teams.
* Partner with stakeholders (product, marketing, CRM, sales, customer care, analytics) to turn model outputs into decision-grade signals (scores, segments, triggers) that can be used in reporting, experimentation, and activation.
* Productionize models with clear documentation, reproducibility, and governance—ensuring model assumptions and limitations are understood.
* Contribute to the long-term customer analytics / commercial modeling roadmap: what we model, why, and how we standardize the approach across use cases — with Customer 360 as a key near-term initiative.


**What You'll Bring**
 We believe you’re a curious, pragmatic, and collaborative data scientist who can connect modeling work to real business decisions.
   

  

 Required / strongly preferred:
   

  

* Strong experience in applied machine learning for customer analytics (churn, propensity, segmentation, scoring).
* Solid statistical foundations (experimental thinking, bias/variance, calibration, confidence/uncertainty, causal pitfalls).
* Proficiency in Python for data science (pandas, scikit-learn and/or similar) and SQL for analytics.
* Experience working with large-scale data in a modern data platform (e.g., Snowflake / cloud data warehouse environments).
* Ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders; comfortable explaining model performance, tradeoffs, and limitations.


 Nice to have:
   

  

* Experience with time-to-event / survival analysis, uplift modeling, or causal inference methods.
* Experience deploying models into production (batch or near-real-time scoring), plus monitoring and alerting.
* Experience with feature stores, ML pipelines, or MLOps practices.
* Familiarity with Customer 360 / identity resolution / customer master data concepts.


 Ways of working
   

  

* You will work in a cross-functional environment with data engineers, analytics engineers, product partners, and domain experts.
* You will be based in Stockholm and collaborate closely with stakeholders across Volvo Cars.


**Volvo Cars. For Life.**
 For nearly a century, Volvo Cars has empowered people to move freely in a personal, sustainable and safe way. Today, we are driving bold advancements in electrification, sustainability and automotive safety. To realise our ambitious vision, we are seeking innovative minds who are ready to tackle the challenges of tomorrow – today.
   

  

 In our company, we believe extraordinary things are achieved by ordinary people with the drive to make a difference.
   

  

**Ready to take the next step?**
 Submit your CV in English and tell us why you’re the ideal candidate for a new role at Volvo Cars. Applications must be received no later than July 10th 2026. We are prioritising direct applications to ensure a fair and efficient application process.
   

  

 Please note that due to vacation break we will not be reviewing or getting back to applicants until week 33.
   

  

 For questions regarding the recruitment process, please contact Recruiter Simona Popencu at simona.popencu@volvocars.com. For specific questions about the position, please reach out to Hiring Manager Pierdomenico Polito at pierdomenico.polito@volvocars.com.
   

  

 As part of the recruitment process, the final candidates might undergo a background check.
   

  

 We welcome your application!

title: Business Systems & CRM Specialist till RiseRank
description:
**Bygg systemen bakom ett av Sveriges snabbast växande SEO-bolag**
**Om RiseRank**
 RiseRank är ett snabbväxande bolag inom Blackfish-koncernen som hjälper företag att stärka sin lokala synlighet på plattformar som bl.a Google, Apple och Bing. Vi startade i Stockholm och har på kort tid expanderat till både Göteborg och Malmö. Nu står vi inför nästa stora steg, internationell expansion.
   

  

 För att kunna fortsätta växa söker vi nu en
 **Business Systems & CRM Specialist** 
 som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för våra interna system, CRM-struktur, automatiseringar, dashboards och datadrivna processer.
   

  

 Det här är en nyckelroll för dig som tycker om att skapa ordning, bygga smarta system och effektivisera verksamheter genom teknik. Du kommer att arbeta nära grundarna och få stort mandat att påverka hur RiseRank bygger en modern, AI-driven och skalbar organisation.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som
 **Business Systems & CRM Specialist** 
 blir du ansvarig för att utveckla och optimera våra interna systemflöden. Du säkerställer att rätt data finns på rätt plats, bygger dashboards som ger verksamheten insikter och utvecklar automatiseringar som sparar tid och skapar kvalitet.
   

  

 Du blir navet mellan sälj, marknad, Customer Success och ledning när det kommer till CRM, rapportering, systemutveckling och interna processer.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som tycker att välbyggda processer är lika viktiga som välskriven kod och som vill använda modern teknik och AI för att skapa smartare arbetssätt.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta med CRM-system
* Har byggt dashboards och rapporter
* Har arbetat med automatiseringar och systemflöden
* Har förståelse för API och integrationer
* Har lätt för att sätta dig in i nya system och digitala verktyg
* Är analytisk, datadriven och strukturerad
* Tycker om att effektivisera processer och skapa smarta arbetssätt
* Trivs i en entreprenörsdriven miljö där mycket händer


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av att implementera eller vidareutveckla CRM-system
* Erfarenhet av att bygga dashboards och rapporter i exempelvis Power BI, Looker Studio eller Tableau
* Erfarenhet av automatiseringsverktyg som Zapier, Make eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av API, webhooks och systemintegrationer
* Goda kunskaper inom AI och erfarenhet av att använda AI-verktyg för att effektivisera arbetsflöden, analys, rapportering och interna processer
* Erfarenhet av KPI-uppföljning, analys och verksamhetsrapportering
* Förståelse för hur digitala kundresor och interna processer hänger ihop


**Vem du är**
 Du är en person som ser möjligheter där andra ser manuella arbetsmoment. Du tycker om att skapa struktur, bygga smarta lösningar och göra organisationer mer effektiva genom teknik.
   

  

 Du är nyfiken på ny teknik och håller dig uppdaterad kring hur AI, automation och moderna system kan användas för att skapa smartare arbetssätt och effektivare processer.
   

  

 Du trivs när du får ta ansvar, lösa problem och driva förbättringar från idé till färdig lösning. Samtidigt är du prestigelös och uppskattar att arbeta nära verksamheten.
   

  

**Plats: Stockholm**
**Tjänsten är en heltidsanställning**
**Startdatum: Enligt överenskommelse**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Vid frågor gällande tjänsten besvaras av vår rekryteringskonsult Emmy Zachrisson,
   

  

 Mail: emmy@riserank.se
